picks.title: Campbell Library Grand Reopening
picks.why: Campbell Library's grand reopening is a rare civic milestone—celebrate a beloved community space transformed.

picks.title: 8th Annual International Mother Language Festival: Art & Celebration
picks.why: Celebrate Mother Language Day through art at San Jose Museum of Art—annual cultural festival honoring immigrant voices.

picks.title: FOPAL Book Sale
picks.why: Over 70,000 books across three rooms at FOPAL's monthly sale—unbeatable treasure hunt for readers and collectors.

picks.title: Mother’s Day Spring Tea
picks.why: Mother's Day Spring Tea at History Park on Sun, May 10 2:00 PM—perfect family tradition in a historic setting.

picks.title: Academy of Classical Ballet – The Four Seasons and Peter and the Wolf
picks.why: Academy of Classical Ballet performs Vivaldi and Prokofiev on Sat, May 9 7:00 PM—gorgeous spring performances by local dancers.
